infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: DRYP needs access to your photos so you can share style inspiration and save your favorite looks.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: DRYP uses the camera to let you capture outfit photos and discover similar styles.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: DRYP can save outfit photos and screenshots to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: DRYP may use the microphone for video-based style recommendations in the future.
